name: Sprint Report
description: Summary of sprint progress: completed vs remaining issues, velocity, and burndown data.

queries.title: Sprint Issues by Status
queries.question: For each active sprint, how many issues are in each status category (To Do, In Progress, Done)?

queries.title: Sprint Velocity
queries.question: What is the total story points completed per sprint for the last 5 closed sprints?

name: Issue Breakdown
description: Issue distribution by type, status, priority, and project.

queries.title: Issues by Type
queries.question: How many issues are there for each issue type (Bug, Story, Task, Epic, etc.)?

queries.title: Issues by Priority
queries.question: How many issues are there for each priority level?

queries.title: Issues by Status
queries.question: How many issues are in each status?

name: Team Workload
description: Work distribution across team members: assigned issues, logged hours, and completion rates.

queries.title: Open Issues per Assignee
queries.question: How many open issues (not Done) does each assignee have?

queries.title: Hours Logged per User
queries.question: How many total hours has each user logged in worklogs?

name: Cycle Time
description: Measure how long issues take from creation to resolution, grouped by type and priority.

queries.title: Average Cycle Time by Issue Type
queries.question: What is the average number of days from creation to resolution for each issue type, for resolved issues?

queries.title: Average Cycle Time by Priority
queries.question: What is the average number of days from creation to resolution for each priority level, for resolved issues?

name: Bug Tracking
description: Track open bugs by severity, project, assignee, and resolution trends over time.

queries.title: Open Bugs by Priority
queries.question: How many open bugs are there for each priority level?

queries.title: Bugs by Project
queries.question: How many bug-type issues are in each project?

queries.title: Bug Resolution Trend
queries.question: How many bugs were resolved each month over the last 6 months?
